title: POKEFUN Server – The Ultimate Pokemon Adventure [Cobblemon]
description: The Most Advanced Cobblemon SMP Experience | Cobblemon 1.7.3 | ALL Pokémon + Fusions + Fakemon | Mega, Dynamax, Z-Moves | Custom Raids & Gyms | Battle Pass | Economy | Optimized | Fabric 1.21.1
body:
## 🧬 Based on Cobblemon 1.7.3 – Always Latest. Always Optimized.

👇 Explore features below 👇

Welcome to Pokefun SMP — The Ultimate Cobblemon 1.7.3 Experience!
...


Pokefun SMP is the most advanced public Cobblemon experience ever created.

⚡ Fully updated to the latest Cobblemon
⚡ Fabric 1.21.1
⚡ Optimized for low-end & high-end PCs
⚡ Constant updates & active development

---

## 🌍 A True Pokémon World Inside Minecraft

Minecraft: Java Edition meets Pokémon in the most ambitious SMP ever built.

* ALL Pokémon Available (No Restrictions)
* Legendaries, Mythicals, Paradox & Ultra Beasts spawn naturally
* Custom Summoning Mechanics
* Improved Shiny Rate
* 1200+ PC Slots (Living Dex Ready)
* Wild Pokémon can attack
* Capture XP System
* Daily Tasks & Progression

---

## ⚔️ Battle System – More Advanced Than Any Cobblemon Pack

✔ Mega Evolution
✔ Dynamax & Gigantamax
✔ Z-Moves
✔ Terastallization
✔ Alpha Pokémon
✔ Primal Forms
✔ Custom Battle Points System
✔ Radical Trainer Level Caps (Optional)

Custom Boss Pokémon Events
Raid Dens + Raid Gyms
Custom NPC Raids

This is not vanilla Cobblemon.
This is competitive Pokémon inside Minecraft.

---

## 🏛️ Custom Adventure Content (Exclusive to Pokefun)

* Custom Gym Leaders & Trainers
* Mystic Islands
* Legendary Monument
* Massive World Border
* Epic Adventure Builds
* Custom Raid Arenas
* Exclusive Structures with Rare Loot

You are not just playing survival.
You are entering a Pokémon MMO world.

---

## 🧪 Unique Features You Won’t Find Elsewhere

🔥 Custom Fusion Pokémon
🔥 Fakemon & Fusimons
🔥 Custom Crates (Paradox, Skin, Gimmick, Fusion)
🔥 Pokémon Skins & Cosmetics
🔥 Armor & Weapon Cosmetics
🔥 CobbleDollars Economy
🔥 CobbleWordle
🔥 Battle Pass System
🔥 Daily Quests
🔥 Events & Giveaways

---

## 🌐 Multiplayer Focused SMP

* Offline Mode Supported
* Player Economy
* Trading System
* Competitive Leaderboards
* Community Tournaments
* Daily Events
* Discord-integrated Support

---

## 🏎️ Performance Optimized

* Lag-free multiplayer experience
* Optimized shaders
* Performance-focused Fabric setup
* Smooth gameplay even on mid-range PCs
* Balanced spawn mechanics

Always updated. Always stable.

---

## 🔥 Why Choose Pokefun Over Other Cobblemon Packs?

Unlike other packs that lock features or restrict Pokémon…

Pokefun gives you:

✔ Full Pokédex Access
✔ No Content Paywalls
✔ More Custom Systems
✔ More Competitive Depth
✔ More Adventure Structures
✔ More Multiplayer Focus

Built for long-term survival.
Built for content creators.
Built for serious Pokémon trainers.

---

---

# 🌟 Core Technology & Official Addons

Pokefun SMP is powered by the latest **Cobblemon 1.7.3** ecosystem and enhanced with carefully selected official addons and expansion systems.

All systems are fully integrated, optimized, and multiplayer-ready.

---

## 🧬 Core Pokémon Framework

* **Cobblemon (Fabric 1.7.3)**
  The complete Pokémon battle, catching, breeding, and progression system.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

---

## ⚔️ Advanced Battle Systems

* **Mega Showdown (Cobblemon Addon)**
  Competitive battle mechanics including Mega Evolution integration.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)

* **ZAMega**
  Expanded Mega mechanics and battle depth.

* **Simple TMs**
  TM-based move learning system.

* **Cobblemon Trials Edition**
  Structured Pokémon challenge content.

---

## 🏛️ Gyms, Raids & World Expansion

* **Rad Gyms (Cobblemon)**
  Custom gym battle framework.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/mod/rad-gyms](https://modrinth.com/mod/rad-gyms)

* **Cobblemon Raid Dens**
  Multiplayer raid encounters.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonraiddens)

* **Legendary Monuments**
  Legendary summoning structures and altars.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-monuments)

* **Spawn Notification**
  Rare & Legendary Pokémon spawn alerts.

---

## 🧪 Pokémon Enhancement Systems

* **Cobblemon Alphas**
  Alpha Pokémon variants.

* **Cobblemon Size Variation**
  Realistic Pokémon size scaling.

* **Cobbreeding**
  Advanced breeding system.

* **Cobblemon Research Tasks**
  Pokédex progression expansion.

* **CobbleNav**
  Pokémon tracking & navigation tools.

---

## 💎 Gameplay Expansion & Integration

* **ATM x Mega Showdown (AllTheMons Integration)**
  Expanded compatibility layer for battle systems.
  🔗 [https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)

* **Cobblemon Armory**
  Pokémon-themed equipment.

* **CobbleFurnies**
  Pokémon decorative furniture.

* **CobbleCardQuest (Beta)**
  Additional Pokémon gameplay expansion.

---

# 🎁 Fully Integrated & Pre-Configured

All listed systems are:

✔ Pre-installed
✔ Fully configured
✔ Multiplayer tested
✔ Optimized for Fabric 1.21.1
✔ No manual setup required

Pokefun SMP integrates these systems into one seamless experience.

---

# 🛡️ Official Credit & Respect

All core Pokémon mechanics, battle systems, and expansion features are developed by their respective original authors.

Pokefun SMP does not claim ownership of Cobblemon or its addons.

All custom builds, balancing, economy systems, events, structures, and gameplay integrations are created and maintained by the Pokefun Team.

We sincerely thank the Cobblemon developers and addon creators for making this experience possible.

---
